form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage eighth but before that won by 2 lengths at this track (19.65) beating Very Best Buddy in a Grade 5 on March 11. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.49) when fourth over 400m at The Gardens in a Grade 4/5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Placed last time (19.74) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 2.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 7 lengths at this track over 340m (19.43) beating Quirky Nacho in Grade 5 on April 1. Well-performed from this draw. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (19.91) when third at this track in a Grade 4/5. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from four starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 8 over 340m at this track behind Lola Mcgraw beaten 2.25 lengths (20.23) in a Grade 5. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 300m at Taree Super Track clocking 17.49. Close to the speed and boxed on well at his latest run. In the mix again.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 318m at Dubbo in a handy (18.93), beating Magic Breakout. Will find this a bit tougher, others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 340m at this track behind Cluster One beaten 14 lengths (20.44). Placed two back at this track. Has run blistering time here with a 19.59 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.
